case_title: DEREK DAL PONTE VS. SCOTT PERKINS et al

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUN-25-2013 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUN-25-2013 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES, EXCEPT DEFENDANT KATHRYNE MONIER. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
REQUEST TO POSTPONE SMALL CLAIMS HEARING FILED BY DEFENDANT PERKINS, SCOTT
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $ 30.00 - SERVED APR-26-2013, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT PERKINS, SCOTT
ORDER (SC-152) ON REQUEST TO POSTPONE TRIAL - GRANTED PER JUDGE DONALD S. MITCHELL -
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-25-2013 - JUDGMENT.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,065.00 FILED BY DAL PONTE, DEREK AS TO DEFENDANT PERKINS, SCOTT MONIER, KATHRYNE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-29-2013 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $ 30.00 - SERVED APR-26-2013, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT MONIER, KATHRYNE
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-29-2013 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF DEFENDANT TO JUN-25-2013 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF DAL PONTE, DEREK RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT PERKINS, SCOTT MONIER, KATHRYNE $1,485.00 PRINCIPAL, $110.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,595.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
